The '''TS-Titan''' was an industrial-grade [[Beamdrill/Legends|beamdrill]] manufactured by [[Karflo Corporation/Legends|Karflo Corporation]]. It was designed for use on large-scale construction projects, such as [[Starship/Legends|starship]] manufacturing, and building structures and highways. Measuring over ten [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long, the TS-Titan was mounted on a [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] platform.<ref name="EGWT" />

The [[Plasma/Legends|plasma]] beam generated by the TS-Titan was ten meters long, and up to three meters in diameter.<ref name="EGWT" /> TS-Titans were installed in [[Corellia Mining Corporation/Legends|Corellia Mining Corporation's]] [[A-11 Model III "Burrower" Tunnel Boring Vehicle]], a ground vehicle designed to excavate mine shafts.<ref name="Suns of Fortune">''[[Suns of Fortune]]''</ref>
